label: dash_date_rescue_rate
sql: SELECT AVG(rescue_rate_pct) AS overall_rescue_rate_pct FROM date_rescue_rate_summary

label: metric_02_cancer_eligible
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM analysis_cancer_cohort_v1 WHERE analysis_eligible_flag IS TRUE

label: metric_03_molecular_tested
sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT research_id) FROM molecular_test_episode_v2 WHERE cancelled_flag IS NOT TRUE

label: metric_06_braf_positive
sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT research_id) FROM extracted_braf_recovery_v1 WHERE braf_status='positive'

label: metric_07_ete_graded
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM extracted_ete_ene_tert_refined_v1 WHERE ete_grade_v9 IS NOT NULL

label: metric_08_recurrence_any
sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT research_id) FROM extracted_recurrence_refined_v1 WHERE recurrence_any IS TRUE
